6:["$","$L17",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  S1[Session 1\n  Day 1] -->|store| DB[(Mnemosyne)]\n  S2[Session 2\n  Day 3] -->|recall| DB\n  S3[Session 3\n  Day 7] -->|recall| DB\n  \n  style DB fill:#f0fdf4,stroke:#16a34a\n"}]
7:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Session Management"}]
8:["$","$L18",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Memory\n\nmem = Memory()\n\n# Start a task\nsession_id = mem.start_session(\n  name=\"website-redesign\",\n  description=\"Redesign company website\",\n)\n\n# Store progress\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"Completed hero section design. User approved color palette.\",\n  session_id=session_id,\n  tags=[\"website-redesign\", \"design\"],\n)\n\n# Later session — resume context\nmem.resume_session(session_id)\ncontext = mem.recall_session(session_id)\n","language":"python"}]
9:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Checkpointing"}]
a:["$","p",null,{"children":"Save intermediate states:"}]
b:["$","$L18",null,{"code":"# Create checkpoint\ncheckpoint = mem.checkpoint()\nmem.remember(\n  content=f\"Checkpoint: {checkpoint.id}\",\n  tags=[\"checkpoint\"],\n)\n\n# Restore if needed\nmem.restore_checkpoint(checkpoint.id)\n","language":"python"}]
c:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Deployment Considerations"}]

e:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Example: Weekly Report Agent"}]
f:["$","$L18",null,{"code":"# Runs every Monday at 9 AM\ndef generate_weekly_report():\n  mem = Memory()\n  \n  # Recall last week's activities\n  last_week = mem.recall(\n      \"project updates decisions\",\n      since=(datetime.now() - timedelta(days=7)).isoformat(),\n  )\n  \n  # Generate report\n  report = compile_report(last_week)\n  \n  # Store report for future reference\n  mem.remember(\n      content=report.summary,\n      tags=[\"weekly-report\", f\"week-{get_week_number()}\"],\n      importance=0.7,\n  )\n  \n  return report\n","language":"python"}]
